name: closedclaw
description: Every person deserves their own AI agent

scripts.build: bun run --filter @closedclaw/agent build && bun run --filter @closedclaw/server build && bun run --filter @closedclaw/dashboard build && bun run --filter @closedclaw/cli build
scripts.test: bun run --filter @closedclaw/server test && bun run --filter @closedclaw/agent test
